Package space.sunqian.fs.object.builder

Interface BuilderOperatorProvider

@ThreadSafe public interface BuilderOperatorProvider
This interface is the provider of BuilderOperator.

The default BuilderOperatorProvider is defaultProvider().

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler
    Handler for BuilderOperatorProvider, provides the actual BuilderOperator generating logic.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler
    asHandler()
    Returns this BuilderOperatorProvider as a BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler.
    static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider
    defaultCachedProvider()
    Returns the default cached BuilderOperatorProvider, which is based on defaultProvider() and caches the results with a SimpleCache.ofSoft().
    static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider
    defaultProvider()
    Returns the default BuilderOperatorProvider.
    default @Nullable BuilderOperator
    forType(@Nonnull Type target)
    Returns an instance of BuilderOperator for the target type, or null if the target type is unsupported.
    @Nonnull List<@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler>
    handlers()
    Returns all handlers of this BuilderOperatorProvider.
    static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider
    newCachedProvider(@Nonnull SimpleCache<@Nonnull Type,@Nonnull BuilderOperator> cache, @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider provider)
    Returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider that caches the returned BuilderOperator instances with the specified cache.
    static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider
    newProvider(@Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler> handlers)
    Creates and returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider with given handlers.
    static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider
    newProvider(@Nonnull @RetainedParam BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler @Nonnull ... handlers)
    Creates and returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider with the given handlers.
    default @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider
    withFirstHandler(@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler firstHandler)
    Returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider of which first handler is the given handler and the next handler is this BuilderOperatorProvider as a BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler.

  • Method Details

    • defaultProvider

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider defaultProvider()
      Returns the default BuilderOperatorProvider. Here are handlers in the default provider:
      • CommonBuilderHandler.getInstance()

      Note the default BuilderOperatorProvider is singleton, and never caches the returned BuilderOperator instances.

      Returns:
      the default BuilderOperatorProvider
      See Also:
      • CommonBuilderHandler

    • defaultCachedProvider

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider defaultCachedProvider()
      Returns the default cached BuilderOperatorProvider, which is based on defaultProvider() and caches the results with a SimpleCache.ofSoft().

      Note the default cached BuilderOperatorProvider is singleton.

      Returns:
      the default BuilderOperatorProvider
      See Also:
      • defaultProvider()

    • newProvider

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider newProvider(@Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler @Nonnull ... handlers)
      Creates and returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider with the given handlers.

      Note the created BuilderOperatorProvider never caches the returned BuilderOperator instances.

      Parameters:
      handlers - the given handlers
      Returns:
      a new BuilderOperatorProvider with the given handlers

    • newProvider

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider newProvider(@Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler> handlers)
      Creates and returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider with given handlers.

      Note the created BuilderOperatorProvider never caches the returned BuilderOperator instances.

      Parameters:
      handlers - given handlers
      Returns:
      a new BuilderOperatorProvider with given handlers

    • newCachedProvider

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider newCachedProvider(@Nonnull @Nonnull SimpleCache<@Nonnull Type,@Nonnull BuilderOperator> cache, @Nonnull @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider provider)
      Returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider that caches the returned BuilderOperator instances with the specified cache.

      Note the behavior of the non-creating methods of the returned BuilderOperatorProvider, such as handlers(), asHandler() and withFirstHandler(Handler), will directly invoke the underlying BuilderOperatorProvider.

      Parameters:
      cache - the specified cache to store the results
      provider - the underlying BuilderOperatorProvider to create the type
      Returns:
      a new BuilderOperatorProvider that caches the results with the specified cache

    • forType

      @Nullable default @Nullable BuilderOperator forType(@Nonnull @Nonnull Type target) throws ObjectBuilderException
      Returns an instance of BuilderOperator for the target type, or null if the target type is unsupported.
      Parameters:
      target - the target type
      Returns:
      a new BuilderOperator, or null if the target type is unsupported
      Throws:
      ObjectBuilderException - if an error occurs while creating the BuilderOperator

    • handlers

      @Nonnull @Nonnull List<@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler> handlers()
      Returns all handlers of this BuilderOperatorProvider.
      Returns:
      all handlers of this BuilderOperatorProvider

    • withFirstHandler

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider withFirstHandler(@Nonnull @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler firstHandler)
      Returns a new BuilderOperatorProvider of which first handler is the given handler and the next handler is this BuilderOperatorProvider as a BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler. This method is equivalent: 
      
 newProvider(firstHandler, this.asHandler())
      Parameters:
      firstHandler - the first handler
      Returns:
      a new BuilderOperatorProvider of which first handler is the given handler and the next handler is this BuilderOperatorProvider as a BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler

    • asHandler

      @Nonnull @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler asHandler()
      Returns this BuilderOperatorProvider as a BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler.
      Returns:
      this BuilderOperatorProvider as a BuilderOperatorProvider.Handler
